name: Viltrox AF 56mm f/1.7 Lens
description: A compact portrait-length prime lens designed for Nikon Z-mount mirrorless cameras, the Viltrox AF 56mm f/1.7 Z Lens provides a full-frame equivalent of 85mm, making it ideal for portraiture.

features.Key Features:: APS-C | f/1.7 to f/16 | 85mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Excellent Low-Light Performance | STM Stepping Motor | Four ED Elements, Three HR Elements | Eleven Lens Elements in Nine Groups | Supports Exif Data Transmission | Firmware Updates via USB-C Port
